subject: Suggested Digital Applied matrix addition: Ralph Workflow
why_this_action: The latest workflow audit still says the bottleneck is distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion and Codeberg adoption is flat.
Apollo is already inside its launch measurement window until 2026-05-30 and Reddit is fail-closed/high-risk, so the strongest fresh lane is a new high-intent curator/comparison surface.

Digital Applied runs a fresh Q2 2026 20-platform agentic coding matrix with an audience that explicitly cares about workflow shape, autonomy, and review discipline — exactly where Ralph Workflow differentiates.

summary: hardened the curator-email helper to format the From header safely with display names that include special characters like @
added a regression test so future curator outreach runs do not fail on malformed sender headers

verification.contact_proof: Digital Applied contact page publishes info@digitalapplied.com with a stated 2h CET reply SLA.

measurement_window.success_signal: reply, matrix/list inclusion, or a new Digital Applied citation/backlink pointing evaluators to the Codeberg primary repo
measurement_window.kill_condition: If no reply or inclusion signal appears by 2026-06-06, replace this lane with a different untouched comparison/discovery surface instead of re-sending.
